name: Longzhou Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the road transportation business in China. The company is also involved in the operation of passenger terminal; modern logistics activities; sale and maintenance of cars; and sale of oil and gas, as well as passenger transport. As of June 30, 2018, it had 36 passenger stations, 843 passenger lines, and 2928 passenger vehicles, including 1569 passenger buses, 135 coaches, 609 buses, and 615 taxis. The company was formerly known as Fujian Longzhou Transportation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. August 2018. Longzhou Group Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2003 and is based in Longyan, China.
